sglang.title: doc: emphasize and notify the usage of chat_template
sglang.author: mickqian
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As mentioned by @yizhang2077 , chat-template is even more important in VLM, as image embedding involves many special tokens.
Modifications

checked the chat_template actually in use with official chat_template. if not matched, a warning is given.
update docs

Checklist

 Format your code

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix qwen2.5-vl image processor
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #13285
Need to wait Qwen team update the model repo with correct preprocessor_config.json (see https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct/discussions/14)

transformers removed Qwen2_5_VLImageProcessor in latest commit and replaced with Qwen2VLImageProcessor and Qwen2VLImageProcessorFast

vllm.title: [V1][Metrics] Add iteration_tokens_total histogram from V0
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Basing bucket sizes on cudagraph capture sizes was introduced in PR #11031 and #12243.

vllm.title: [AMD] [Model] DeepSeek tunings
vllm.author: rasmith
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds some tunings to improve ROCm performance for DeepSeek.
latency command: VLLM_ENABLE_MOE_ALIGN_BLOCK_SIZE_TRITON=1 VLLM_FP8_PADDING=0 python3 benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --model "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3" -tp 8 --trust-remote-code --max-model-len 32768 --load-format "dummy" --input-le

vllm.title: [V1][PP] Run engine busy loop with batch queue
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is one of the v1 PP PRs that supports running LLM engine busy loop with a batch queue, so that we could decouple scheduling new batches and receiving the model runner outputs. Specifically, the changes include:
Engine Core: To pipeline batches we must decouple scheduling and model execution. We

vllm.title: [ci/build] update flashinfer
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: we have work together with flashinfer to make the wheel python version agnostic, see flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#823 . And they have released a new version with better MLA kernel support, we can use their official wheel right now.

vllm.title: [Doc] [2/N] Add Fuyu E2E example for multimodal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This covers the case where the image tokens include both patch and newline tokens.
Also, avoid hardcoding the value of 30 for the patch size.

vllm.title: [V1][Spec Decode] Ngram Spec Decode
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR tries to add ngram spec decode to V1. Design doc: here.
Major changes:

Since we only implement the ngram spec decode, we did not add another scheduler for running the drafting method. We always check if we need to do ngram lookup before calling the scheduler.
Add a new field _spec_token_ids

vllm.title: [Quant] Add `SupportsQuant` to phi3 and clip
vllm.author: kylesayrs
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

Introduce SupportsQuant which

Initializes the quant_config attribute and updates the quant_config with the relevant packed_modules_mapping
Marks a model as being capable of supporting quantized inference
In the future, will check if a model has been correctly defined, for example if prefix
